title: How I Actually Use AI to Ship Faster: My Workflow Revealed
hook: I shipped my first production feature with AI, skipping the usual design docs and Jira tickets.
partner_takeaway: You can accelerate product delivery by integrating AI into your workflow and dropping unnecessary process steps.
reasoning: Combines a lived story with a high-relevance external case (Gusto's unconventional workflow), making the post actionable for readers who want to use AI to speed up real projects. Practical and timely for an audience eager for workflow hacks.

title: The Pattern That Makes AI Work For Me (And Where People Get It Wrong)
hook: Every time I use AI for project work, I rely on one repeatable pattern—but most people miss the crucial step.
partner_takeaway: Readers learn a tactical AI workflow pattern, including when to use it and how to avoid the most common pitfall.
reasoning: Shares a concrete, reusable workflow from personal experience, filling the Practical AI track with actionable advice. Useful for readers who want to apply AI immediately and avoid common mistakes.

title: AI Agents Are Changing Software—Here’s What You Need to Know
hook: Vercel’s new agent framework doesn’t just automate tasks—it introduces a whole new kind of software.
partner_takeaway: Readers understand why AI agents represent a new software paradigm and what it means for architecture and product design.
reasoning: This trend read is timely as agent-based systems are gaining momentum. The audience needs to understand the shift in software paradigms to stay ahead in industry conversations and product strategy.

title: The Week I Changed My Mind About AI’s Role in Industry
hook: I used to think headline AI trends were hype—until a signal forced me to rethink what’s actually happening.
partner_takeaway: Readers see how real industry signals can challenge and refine their assumptions about AI’s impact.
reasoning: Combines a personal shift in perspective with fresh data on ChatGPT adoption, making the post relatable and credible. Useful for readers who want to base their trend reads on real signals, not just headlines.

title: Building Without Docs: What I Learned Shipping My First AI Feature
hook: I launched a production feature with zero documentation—and learned what matters most when building fast.
partner_takeaway: Readers learn how to prioritize speed and clarity when building in public, even when skipping traditional process steps.
reasoning: This post fits the Building in Public track, showing concrete lessons from a real shipping experience. Valuable for builders who want to move quickly and share what actually works.
